name: Breakfast Focaccia
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the dough in a lightly oiled 10x15" pan. Stretch and press to fill the pan evenly. (If the dough is too elastic to stay in place, let it rest for a few minutes, then press.)
2. Cover the dough lightly with plastic wrap and let stand until puffy, about 45 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, pit the plums and cut into 1/4"-thick slices. Brush the puffy dough with 1 tablespoon butter.
4. Arrange the plum slices, without overlapping, on the dough. Brush the fruit with the remaining butter and sprinkle evenly with the sugar-cinnamon mixture.
5. Bake the focaccia on the bottom rack in a 350°F oven until well browned on edges and bottom (lift gently with a spatula to check), about 40 minutes. Serve warm. (If made ahead, cool, wrap airtight, and hold at room temperature up until the next day. Reheat, uncovered, in a 350°F oven until warm, 5-10 minutes.)
